query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month,
  queryType,
  COUNT(*) as calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN emailFound IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as emailsFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tierPromoted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tiersPromoted,
  SUM(apiCreditsUsed) as creditsUsed
FROM hunterVerificationLog
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m'), queryType
ORDER BY month DESC, queryType;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month,
  queryType,
  COUNT(*) as calls,
  SUM(CASE WHEN emailFound IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as emailsFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tierPromoted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tiersPromoted,
  SUM(apiCreditsUsed) as creditsUsed
FROM hunterVerificationLog
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m'), queryType
ORDER BY month DESC, queryType;
